code_issues: B1-CRITICAL: 32 past-due WC matches still 'scheduled' in matches table — auto_postmatch won't detect, training data stale
B2-CRITICAL: Pipeline divergence — predict_match_full.py has adaptive DC shift, prediction_pipeline.py does NOT
B3-HIGH: calibrator_wc.json deleted (21 WC samples), threshold raised to 50, now falling back to 30-sample pre-WC calibrator
B4-HIGH: 5 prediction JSONs contain 0.0% calibrated probabilities (pre-MIN_PROB fix era)
B5-HIGH: Calibrator flat output — 3 different matches get identical calibrated values (0.528/0.357/0.115)
B6-MEDIUM: test_schedule_stage_distribution fails — DB has 'Quarterfinal' but test expects 'Quarter-final'
B7-MEDIUM: Weibull daemon thread no cleanup — penaltyblog thread safety unknown
B8-MEDIUM: 9/10 recent learning logs orphaned (prediction_run_id=NULL, model_was_right=NULL)
db_issues: 32 WC 2026 matches with match_date < 2026-06-25 still status='scheduled'
Only 8/19 known finished WC matches have their status updated
Most prediction_learning_log entries have NULL prediction_run_id and model_was_right
verdict: System is exposing issues through growth, not degradation. B1 (32 stale matches) is the most impactful. B2 (pipeline divergence) is architectural debt from patching CLI script without updating API pipeline.
